chunks.title: Joab Plans the Return
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of Joab's strategy and preparation of the woman.

chunks.title: The Woman's Plea to the King
chunks.reason: Extended dialogue where the woman presents her case and draws a parallel to Absalom.

chunks.title: The King Questions the Woman
chunks.reason: Direct exchange where the king reveals Joab's involvement.

chunks.title: Absalom Returns to Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Narrative of the king's command and Absalom's initial return with restrictions.

chunks.title: Absalom's Appearance and Waiting
chunks.reason: Descriptive narrative about Absalom's beauty and his two-year wait.

chunks.title: Absalom Forces Joab's Hand
chunks.reason: Narrative of Absalom burning the field to compel Joab to visit him.

chunks.title: Reconciliation with the King
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the narrative where Absalom is fully restored to the king's presence.
